- Project Hub (id: "ws_project_hub")

</available_workspaces>

<available_agents>
- name: FileManagerAgent
  description: Performs creation, moving, renaming, and deletion of files and folders

- name: ContentEditor
  description: Assists with markdown editing, templating, and content generation

- name: TaskPlanner
  description: Helps schedule tasks, set reminders, and maintain habit workflows
</available_agents>
